mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_follow(follower_id, following_id, create_time) VALUES(#{followerId}, #{followingId}, now()) ON CONFLICT (follower_id, following_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.follower_id, f.following_id, f.create_time, u.id AS target_id, u.username AS target_name, u.credit_score AS target_credit_score, u.status AS target_status, true AS followed_by_me, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_follow r WHERE r.follower_id = f.following_id AND r.following_id = f.follower_id ) AS following_me, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_follow r WHERE r.follower_id = f.following_id AND r.following_id = f.follower_id ) AS friend FROM user_follow f LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON f.following_id = u.id WHERE f.follower_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.create_time DESC

SELECT f.id, f.follower_id, f.following_id, f.create_time, u.id AS target_id, u.username AS target_name, u.credit_score AS target_credit_score, u.status AS target_status, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_follow r WHERE r.follower_id = #{userId} AND r.following_id = f.follower_id ) AS followed_by_me, true AS following_me, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_follow r WHERE r.follower_id = #{userId} AND r.following_id = f.follower_id ) AS friend FROM user_follow f LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON f.follower_id = u.id WHERE f.following_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.create_time DESC

SELECT f.id, f.follower_id, f.following_id, f.create_time, u.id AS target_id, u.username AS target_name, u.credit_score AS target_credit_score, u.status AS target_status, true AS followed_by_me, true AS following_me, true AS friend FROM user_follow f INNER JOIN user_follow r ON r.follower_id = f.following_id AND r.following_id = f.follower_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON f.following_id = u.id WHERE f.follower_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.create_time DESC

SELECT u.id AS target_id, u.username AS target_name, u.credit_score AS target_credit_score, u.status AS target_status, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_follow f WHERE f.follower_id = #{userId} AND f.following_id = u.id ) AS followed_by_me, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_follow f WHERE f.follower_id = u.id AND f.following_id = #{userId} ) AS following_me, ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_follow f WHERE f.follower_id = #{userId} AND f.following_id = u.id ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_follow f WHERE f.follower_id = u.id AND f.following_id = #{userId} ) ) AS friend FROM sys_user u WHERE u.id != #{userId} AND u.role = 'USER'
AND u.username ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY u.id ASC
